is_off.description: Tests if one or more water heaters are off.
is_off.name: Water heater is off

is_on.description: Tests if one or more water heaters are on.
is_on.name: Water heater is on

is_operation_mode.description: Tests if one or more water heaters are set to a specific operation mode.

operation_mode.description: The operation mode to check for.
operation_mode.name: Operation mode

is_operation_mode.name: Water heater operation mode

is_target_temperature.description: Tests the temperature setpoint of one or more water heaters.
is_target_temperature.name: Water heater target temperature

not_valid_operation_mode.message: Operation mode {operation_mode} is not valid for {entity_id}. Valid operation modes are: {operation_list}.

operation_list_not_defined.message: Operation mode {operation_mode} is not valid for {entity_id}. The operation list is not defined.

set_away_mode.description: Sets the away mode of a water heater.
set_away_mode.name: Set water heater away mode

set_operation_mode.description: Sets the operation mode of a water heater.
set_operation_mode.name: Set water heater operation mode

set_temperature.description: Sets the target temperature of a water heater.

operation_mode.description: New value of the operation mode. For a list of possible modes, refer to the integration documentation.
operation_mode.name: Operation mode

temperature.description: New target temperature for the water heater.
temperature.name: Temperature

set_temperature.name: Set water heater target temperature

operation_mode_changed.description: Triggers after the operation mode of one or more water heaters changes to a specific mode.

operation_mode.description: The operation modes to trigger on.
operation_mode.name: Operation mode

operation_mode_changed.name: Water heater operation mode changed

target_temperature_changed.description: Triggers after the temperature setpoint of one or more water heaters changes.
target_temperature_changed.name: Water heater target temperature changed

target_temperature_crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after the temperature setpoint of one or more water heaters crosses a threshold.
target_temperature_crossed_threshold.name: Water heater target temperature crossed threshold

turned_off.description: Triggers after one or more water heaters turn off.
turned_off.name: Water heater turned off

turned_on.description: Triggers after one or more water heaters turn on, regardless of the operation mode.
turned_on.name: Water heater turned on
